title: Dashboard Authentication Design
summary: Adds cookie-based session authentication to the SpecGraph web dashboard, removing the local-mode auth bypass.
notes: Contains a Decisions table with rationale (ADR-like) alongside detailed endpoint/request-response/schema specs and file-change lists (SPEC-like). Classified as SPEC because the bulk of content is implementation contract detail (endpoints, cookie config, interceptor flow) rather than a single locked architectural decision; the Decisions table reads as embedded rationale within the broader technical design rather than a standalone ADR structure (no separate Context/Consequences sections). Status: Approved but no ADR numbering convention or path.
